In the story of the Creation Origen reads that man was made male and female in the image of God… the male the rational sense and the (female) flesh. (Freddy Ledegang, Mysterium Ecclesiae: Images of the Church and Its Members in Origen, Published 2001, Peeters Publishers, p 130) He also mentions Philo as holding the same position of male and female.
And thus Elohim created man in his image. In the form of Elohim, He created him, male and female, He created them.
